classes.label: LPVO 1-8×
classes.title: Low-Power Variable Optic, 1–8×
classes.lead: Close-to-mid tactical and driven-game LPVO tier. 1× daylight combat through 8× DMR reach on a single platform.

leadMetric.label: Ventus · peak elevation
leadMetric.note: Tied-second among current FFP 1-8× options — beaten only by the discontinued Leupold Mark 8 CQBSS.

classes.label: LPVO 1-10×
classes.title: Variable Optic, 1–10× — Jupiter
classes.lead: Ten-times zoom LPVO — the contemporary replacement for 1-8× in tactical and 3-Gun platforms. Tighter eye-box, more magnification reach.

leadMetric.label: Ventus · 30mm-tube weight
leadMetric.note: Class-leading among current FFP 1-10× options. Primary Arms PLx 1-10× does not exist; Trijicon Credo HX (601g) is next.

classes.label: Mid 2-12/2-16 × 44
classes.title: Mid-Range 2-12 · 2-16 × 44mm
classes.lead: The PRS-adjacent mid-range tier. 44mm objective, 30mm tube, 2× low-end — a zoom range Western FFP brands largely vacated.

leadMetric.label: Ventus · windage total
leadMetric.note: Class-leading windage by a wide margin. Vector x8 SFP (32 MIL) is next; 34mm premium 3-18× peers sit at 10–23 MIL.

classes.label: Mid 2.5-20 / 3-18 × 50
classes.title: Versatile Field, 2.5-20 · 3-18 × 50mm
classes.lead: The all-round hunting-to-mid-range tier. 50mm objective, 30mm tube, 2.5× or 3× low end. Locking turrets, side focus from 10 yards.

leadMetric.label: Ventus · elevation total
leadMetric.note: Class-leading elevation among 30mm-tube 3-18×50 FFP. Only Vector Continental (34mm tube, 44 MIL) exceeds it.

classes.label: Long 3-24 / 4-24 × 50
classes.title: Long-Range 3-24 · 4-24 × 50mm
classes.lead: Entry to precision long-range. 30mm tube at 24× — uncommon, because most tactical buyers default to 34mm at this magnification class.

leadMetric.label: Ventus · windage total
leadMetric.note: Class-leading across all tube sizes. Nightforce NX8 (also 30mm tube) reaches 20 MRAD; everyone else is below 18 MIL.

classes.label: Long 3.125-25 / 5-25 × 50
classes.title: Precision 3.125-25 · 5-25 × 50mm
classes.lead: The NX8 tier. Ventus 32 MIL elevation on a 30mm tube is matched by only one other scope in class — and that scope costs three times as much.

leadMetric.label: Ventus · 30mm elevation
leadMetric.note: Ties Nightforce NX8 2.5-20×50 F1. No other 30mm-tube FFP in this zoom class exceeds 25 MIL.

models.name: dS Gen II 5-25×52 P L SFP

classes.label: Long 4-32 / 5-30 × 56 (34mm)
classes.title: Alpha-Tier 4-32 · 5-25 · 5-30 × 56mm
classes.lead: The 34mm-tube premium class — Nightforce ATACR, Schmidt & Bender PM II, ZCO, Tangent Theta territory. Ventus enters with a claim nobody else matches.

leadMetric.label: Ventus · elevation claim
leadMetric.note: Leads the entire alpha-tier by 10+ MIL. Next best (Vortex Razor Gen III 6-36) is 36.1 MRAD; NF ATACR 5-25 is 35 MRAD. At 34mm physical ceiling — flagged for verification.

classes.label: ELR 5-40 / 6-36 / 7-35 × 56/60
classes.title: Extreme Long Range, 56 / 60mm Objective
classes.lead: The flagship class. 37.8 MIL elevation, 940g weight, 393mm length — at the GML 5-40×60 tier this is Ventus engineering at its most refined.

leadMetric.label: Ventus · weight
leadMetric.note: Lighter than every premium ELR competitor except Vector Continental. Nightforce ATACR 7-35 is 1113g; Tangent Theta TT735P is ~1220g; Vortex Razor Gen III is 1278g.
